title: rhododendron undulatum
intro: Rhododendron undulatum, also known as the California rhododendron, is a species of flowering plant that is native to the western coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and fight infections. The plant has been shown to have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant properties. Rhododendron undulatum is commonly prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
